message:
fix: make reviewer verdict parsing tolerate non-bold PASS/FAIL

gpt-5.3-codex writes "FAIL\n\n..." without markdown bold markers,
causing the parser to fall through to fail-open. Now checks for
both **PASS**/**FAIL** (bold) and prefix PASS/FAIL (plain).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
